name: Sauerkraut and Bacon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX sauerkraut, carrots, celery, onion, green pepper, and red pepper in a large bowl.
2. COMBINE the sugar and oil in a small bowl.
3. POUR the sugar and oil mixture over the vegetables and mix well to combine.
4. COVER the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. CUT the bacon into 1-inch pieces.
6. COOK the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crisp, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. ADD the cooked bacon to the salad immediately before serving.
8. SERVES 8.
